assertions.text: Output includes a PRESENTER INTRO that names the story and reporter with a natural handover
All clips are labelled with speaker name, in-cue, out-cue, and duration
Package has a clear ending with a reporter sign-off, not a clip followed by silence
Output recommends specific clips with suggested in-points and out-points
Each recommended clip has an editorial justification for its selection
Clips are ranked or ordered by editorial priority
Output includes story context explaining the background situation
Output includes likely presenter questions with answer frameworks
Key facts section is present for the reporter to reference during the live two-way
